title: Fortnicraft
description: Explore structures and collect items and weapons inspired by Fortnite!
body:
Explore Fortnite inspired structures around the Minecraft World, regenerate yourself with Shields, Chug Jugs, Mine down all those blocks with the most popular Harvesting Tools, and protect yourself from the danger with some classic Ranged Weapons.

## Current features:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- 🧱 Build Walls, Stairs, Pyramids and Doors using the game's materials
- 🔫 Guns and their respective ammo
- ⛏️ Fortnite-based Tools
- 🩹 Healing items
- 🧊 Cubes
- 🏘️ Structures made with build materials, find loot inside
- 🚌 Battle Bus and Reboot Van structures
- 🎰 Vending machines
- 🛡️ Upgrade Netherite armor using Cube Scraps
- 🪩 Boogie Bomb
- 🪙 Get V-Bucks or items leveling up with a Battle Pass
- 👑 Victory crown
- 📝 Blueprint to edit walls more easily
- 🔮 Jump into the Zero Point to telepot to a random location, or collect it using a Portal Device; crouch on a Rift to get to the sky
- 📦 Loot chests, rare chests and ammo box usable as storage blocks
- 🍄 Slurp and Shield Mushrooms
- 🦙 Loot Llama and Flopper Fish
- 🏆 Advancements 
- 🎈 Supply Drops
- 🥦 Bush disguise
- 💣 Grenade
- 💨 Shocwave and Impulse Grenades

</details>




Just a little fan fun project, made with MCreator.

Fortnite is a trademark from Epic Games, Inc. This mod is not affiliated or endorsed by.
